title: Packet 048 And Packet 049 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
objective: Publish the local Packet 048 closure authority and Packet 049 decision authority through the parent-root boundary, then resynchronize `/home/olares/code/apex` to the resulting commit without treating authority publication as migration approval or relay search reset execution authority.
active_role: Olares Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Operator
dependency_note: Packet 049 decided that the relay search reset source/test execution packet should not open until Packet 048 closure authority and Packet 049 decision authority are published and `/home/olares/code/apex` is resynchronized.
required_inputs: Current Packet 048 closure handoff and Packet 048 JSON completion state
Current Packet 049 decision handoff and Packet 049 JSON completion state
Current Packet 050 draft, routing handoff, and roadmap updates
Current `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, commit, remote, and cleanliness
Current `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` branch, commit, and status count
constrained_outputs: A bounded parent-root publication commit and push containing only Packet 048 closure authority, Packet 049 decision authority, Packet 050 draft authority, routing, and roadmap updates needed for this gate

A host mirror resync record proving `/home/olares/code/apex` reached clean parity with the published commit without force/reset/clean, remote rewrite, runtime/service mutation, package mutation, install, source edits, or old-clone mutation
A publication and host-mirror resync handoff recording staged scope, commit hash, push result, host pre/post state, excluded drift, and the next decision candidate
validation_steps: Reconfirm parent-root status and distinguish Packet 048/049 closure authority from unrelated `.vercelignore` and older Packet 039 drift.
Reconfirm source files, package files, and lockfiles remain clean and outside the publication scope.
Reconfirm `/home/olares/code/apex` is clean at `f16ad796b987c1cf42124a5a58888822185896f3` before publication.
Reconfirm `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` branch, commit, and status count without mutation.
Stage only Packet 048 closure authority, Packet 049 decision authority, Packet 050 draft authority, routing, and roadmap updates required by this gate.
Run `git diff --cached --check` and inspect staged path scope before committing.
Commit and push the bounded authority publication only if staged scope is exact.
Fast-forward `/home/olares/code/apex` to the published commit only if it can be done non-destructively.

Do not force, reset, clean, rewrite remotes, mutate `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`, install dependencies, mutate packages or lockfiles, mutate runtime or services, approve migration, expand AI-services, change Gitea/code-hosting, change canonical-hosting, edit source, or open the relay search reset execution trial.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no database writes and no source edits, runtime mutation, service mutation, package mutation, lockfile mutation, install, package-manager activation/download, remote rewrite, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, migration approval, force/reset/clean, rollback, or old-clone mutation. It authorizes only bounded authority publication and non-destructive `/home/olares/code/apex` mirror resync.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-04. Packet 050 published Packet 048 closure authority, Packet 049 decision authority, Packet 050 draft authority, routing, and roadmap updates in commit `64e7eaa81c4ab5d4168f7da571df1df2c0f1e1a4`, pushed to `origin/clean-main`, and fast-forwarded `/home/olares/code/apex` from `f16ad796b987c1cf42124a5a58888822185896f3` to clean parity at `64e7eaa81c4ab5d4168f7da571df1df2c0f1e1a4`. It excluded `.vercelignore` and older Packet 039 drift, did not rewrite the moved remote, did not edit source, did not mutate runtime, services, packages, lockfiles, AI-services, Gitea/code-hosting, canonical-hosting, or `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`.
next_action: Open only Packet 051 as a post-050 relay search reset execution readiness decision pass. Do not treat Packet 050 as source execution authority, migration approval, generic Olares reopening, runtime authority, service authority, package authority, AI-services authority, Gitea/code-hosting authority, canonical-hosting authority, remote rewrite authority, force/reset/clean authority, or old-clone mutation authority.
